title: Nébura
description: The Forge Mods Pack For Technology ...
body:
![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d353d5d0138130aa11896f57d5621f5988ca0e.png)

# ✨・mod

here are some mods that are in the pack:
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) & Additions
- [ESSENTIAL Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfish-furniture-mod)
- [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)
- [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)

# 📜・presentation

since there is [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) on the modpack, there are many new biomes like the coniferous forest...

in addition with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) we can make farms of all kinds and autonomous machines

with [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfish-furniture-mod) you can decorate your builds with furniture

the best is the Seasons of [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) which gives seasons to the games
